theme: Bail out banks to stop a default domino
title: Firebreak: Rescue Cash in an Interbank Clearing Network
strategies: do-nothing baseline: never inject any cash (the checker's own reference construction)
own-shortfall greedy: rank banks by (obligations - own cash) ignoring the network entirely, fully fund the worst gaps first until the budget runs out

marginal fixed-point water-filling: repeatedly re-clear the network, probe every currently-defaulting bank for the drop in total system-wide shortfall a small cash slice there would cause, and spend each slice where the CASCADE benefit is largest -- re-simulating after every slice so newly-unlocked or newly-defaulting banks are always accounted for
